name: timekeeper
description: Built by DivergeIT for FedReceiver, Inc. — a Microsoft 365-native legal practice assistant. Timekeeper reconstructs billable time from Outlook, Teams, and calendar; drafts court-defensible entries in the firm's exact format; produces polished billing workbooks and sign-off memos; and helps with matters, contacts, calendar, enterprise search, document parsing, and billing review. It exports an import-ready CSV for Clio Manage and can publish reviewed output to the firm's SharePoint site. Every entry is human-reviewed before it's billed. Works in Claude.ai, Claude Cowork, and Claude Code. Use it to log or reconstruct time, build a billing workbook, find unbilled work, review or reconcile billing, look up a matter or contact, search Microsoft 365, parse invoices or contracts, or get DivergeIT IT support.
